---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: blogs
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: "images/an_teallach_dusk.jpg" 
title-block-banner-color: "white"
---

::: {.text-center}
# Blog

This page is a repository for my blog posts.  
Blogging provides an informal platform through which to share my research.  
Expect mountains, snow, satellites, and maybe a few personal opinions.  
**All views are my own.**
:::

---
